---
id: alert-short
title: "Alert Short"
description: "Short form of alerts, does not contain details about the alert. This is mainly meant for SOTI."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/alert_short"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Short form of alerts, does not contain details about the alert. This is mainly meant for SOTI.

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

payload","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","enum":["FIRMWARE_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","FIRMWARE_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","BATTERY_LOW_SET","BATTERY_LOW_CLEAR","BATTERY_CRITICAL_SET","BATTERY_FULL","TEMPERATURE_HIGH_SET","TEMPERATURE_HIGH_CLEAR","TEMPERATURE_CRITICAL_SET","TEMPERATURE_CRITICAL_CLEAR","NETWORK_INTERFACE_CHANGE","FIRMWARE_UPDATE_FAIL","FIRMWARE_UPDATE_SUCCESS","WIFI_CONFIG_SUCCESS","WIFI_CONFIG_FAIL","ETH_CONFIG_SUCCESS","ETH_CONFIG_FAIL","POWER_SOURCE_UPDATE","MQTT_INSTALL_CERTIFICATE_SUCCESS","MQTT_INSTALL_CERTIFICATE_FAIL","MQTT_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","MQTT_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","MQTT_CLIENT_KEY_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","MQTT_CLIENT_KEY_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","MQTT_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","MQTT_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","WIFI_INSTALL_CERTIFICATE_SUCCESS","WIFI_INSTALL_CERTIFICATE_FAIL","WIFI_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","WIFI_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","WIFI_CLIENT_KEY_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","WIFI_CLIENT_KEY_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","WIFI_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","WIFI_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_INSTALL_CERTIFICATE_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_INSTALL_CERTIFICATE_FAIL","FILESTORE_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","FILESTORE_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_CLIENT_KEY_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","FILESTORE_CLIENT_KEY_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_FAIL","FILESTORE_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","MQTT_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","MQTT_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_FAIL","MQTT_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","MQTT_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_FAIL","MQTT_CLIENT_KEY_INSTALL_SUCCESS","MQTT_CLIENT_KEY_INSTALL_FAIL","WIFI_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","WIFI_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_FAIL","WIFI_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","WIFI_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_FAIL","WIFI_CLIENT_KEY_INSTALL_SUCCESS","WIFI_CLIENT_KEY_INSTALL_FAIL","FILESTORE_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_FAIL","FILESTORE_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_FAIL","FILESTORE_CLIENT_KEY_INSTALL_SUCCESS","FILESTORE_CLIENT_KEY_INSTALL_FAIL"],"example":"FIRMWARE_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","description":"The unique identifier for the alert, representing the specific type of event or notification."},"timestamp":{"type":"string","format":"time","description":"The time when the alert was generated, formatted as a string."},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["NOTIFICATION","ALERT"],"description":"The category of the message, indicating whether it is a notification or an alert."},"priority":{"type":"string","enum":["HIGH","LOW","CRITICAL"],"description":"The urgency level of the alert, specifying its priority as HIGH, LOW, or CRITICAL."},"messageID":{"type":"string","example":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","enum":["ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS"],"description":"The identifier for the message type, used to categorize the source or purpose of the alert."},"description":{"type":"string","example":"firmware download started","description":"A brief human-readable text describing the alert or notification."}},"required":["id","timestamp","type","priority","messageID","description"]},"examples":{"Firmware download success":{"description":"Alert indicating successful firmware download","value":{"id":"FIRMWARE_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","timestamp":"22:54:25","type":"ALERT","priority":"LOW","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"firmware download completed successfully"}},"Battery critical set":{"description":"Alert indicating battery level is critically low","value":{"id":"BATTERY_CRITICAL_SET","timestamp":"14:30:15","type":"ALERT","priority":"CRITICAL","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"battery level is critically low"}},"WiFi config fail":{"description":"Notification indicating WiFi configuration failure","value":{"id":"WIFI_CONFIG_FAIL","timestamp":"09:15:42","type":"NOTIFICATION","priority":"HIGH","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"WiFi configuration failed"}},"MQTT CA certificate download success":{"description":"Notification indicating successful MQTT CA certificate download","value":{"id":"MQTT_ROOT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","timestamp":"2026-04-17T05:09:13.805Z","type":"NOTIFICATION","priority":"HIGH","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"MQTT root certificate download success"}},"MQTT CA certificate install success":{"description":"Notification indicating successful MQTT CA certificate installation","value":{"id":"MQTT_ROOT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","timestamp":"2026-04-17T05:09:13.808Z","type":"NOTIFICATION","priority":"HIGH","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"MQTT root certificate install success"}},"WiFi client certificate download success":{"description":"Notification indicating successful WiFi client certificate download","value":{"id":"WIFI_CLIENT_CERT_DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS","timestamp":"2026-04-17T05:09:57.351Z","type":"NOTIFICATION","priority":"HIGH","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"Wi-Fi client certificate download success"}},"WiFi client certificate install success":{"description":"Notification indicating successful WiFi client certificate installation","value":{"id":"WIFI_CLIENT_CERT_INSTALL_SUCCESS","timestamp":"2026-04-17T05:09:57.354Z","type":"NOTIFICATION","priority":"HIGH","messageID":"ZEBRA_RFID_HH_ALERTS","description":"Wi-Fi client key download fail"}}}}}}}}
